summary: Graph bootstrap: add 219 transcendental-magic chunk nodes + BELONGS_TO edges
description:
Back up the DB first (scripts/backup_db.sh), then python3 scripts/graph_bootstrap.py --dry-run to confirm it is incremental: expect exactly the 219 new chunk nodes + BELONGS_TO(western_esoteric) edges for transcendental-magic-doctrine/-ritual, zero changes to existing nodes/edges. Then run for real.

Also update docs/summary/work-grouping.md: the transcendental-magic row and header caveat say 'not yet in DB' — amend to reflect bootstrap (embed still pending).

Done: node/edge counts before/after recorded in close note; chunk node count for the two texts = 219; existing counts unchanged; census caveat updated and committed.

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Spec assumed a functional --dry-run preview; graph_bootstrap.py's --dry-run is a stub (logs 'Dry run — no DB writes' and returns, computing nothing). Incremental safety verified by code-read instead: upsert_node is ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE (idempotent — refreshes to corpus TOML values, which are unchanged for existing texts), upsert_edge is ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. Verification is before/after count deltas. DB backed up first (guru-20260714T162845Z-manual).

resolution.note: DB backed up (guru-20260714T162845Z-manual). graph_bootstrap run over full corpus (idempotent upserts; --dry-run is a stub, see analysis note). Deltas exact: chunk nodes 4174->4393 (+219), BELONGS_TO 4174->4393 (+219); concept/tradition nodes and CONTRASTS/EXPRESSES/PARALLELS edges unchanged. 219 nodes+edges confirmed by id-prefix query. work-grouping.md caveat updated.
